understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 puzzle levels by maneuvering every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+'; if a level has multiple goals, all must be occupied by selectables at the same time to trigger WIN and advance, eventually winning the full run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controls the currently selected piece (identified by player.id/position) on a grid where each cell corresponds to 3 pixels; MOVE actions attempt to shift the selected piece one cell in the chosen direction, potentially being blocked or altered by walls/boundaries. Pushable blocks can be moved when immediately adjacent in the movement direction, shifting along with the selected piece if space allows, while walls generally prevent movement through them. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; CLICK with an exact pixel/grid target_position matching an on-screen selectable switches which piece is controlled. The movement_*_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and don’t guarantee success or failure, so experimenting with moves is sometimes necessary.
